section_miscategorizations.text: He also reports chronic constipation and takes miralax, which helps.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Chronic constipation is an ongoing condition and its treatment; in a focused acute-injury note it would more clearly belong under Assessment as an active problem rather than within the acute HPI for the finger injury.

section_miscategorizations.text: He had his appendix removed when he was seven years old.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is past surgical history, not part of the present illness narrative; it would more appropriately be documented in a problem/PMH area (here best approximated by Assessment) rather than in the HPI for the finger injury.
